title: Confirmar una comanda desde el carrito
description: Verifies that a client can add items and confirm the order successfully from the menu flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /mesa
Select a table
Continue to the menu
Add a product to the cart
Confirm the order
Verify a confirmation message is shown
Verify the order is no longer pending in the cart

title: Iniciar sesión como administrador y ver su panel
description: Verifies that an authenticated administrator lands on the correct dashboard after signing in.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the administrator dashboard is displayed

title: Empleado entra al dashboard correcto según su rol
description: Verifica que un empleado inicie sesión y llegue al panel correspondiente a su rol entre administración, mesero, cocina o caja.
category: Login multi-rol y acceso a dashboards

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the employee login credentials for the required role
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard for the authenticated role

title: Cobrar una venta pendiente y calcular el cambio
description: Verifies that a cashier can pay a pending sale, see the change calculated, and remove the sale from the pending list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /caja
Select a pending sale
Enter a valid payment amount
Select a payment method
Submit the payment
Verify the calculated change is shown
Verify the paid sale is removed from the pending list

title: Empleado accede a su panel según su rol
description: Verifica que un empleado pueda iniciar sesión y llegar al dashboard correcto según su rol.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the role-specific dashboard is displayed

title: Agregar productos al carrito desde el menú
description: Verifies that a client can browse menu categories, add products, and see the cart reflect the added item.

steps.description: Navigate to /mesa
Select a table
Continue to the menu
Browse a menu category
Add a product to the cart
Verify the cart reflects the added product

title: Cajero cobra una venta pendiente y calcula el cambio
description: Verifica que el cajero pueda revisar ventas pendientes, registrar un pago, ver el cambio calculado y confirmar que la venta desaparece de la lista.
category: Panel de caja para cobrar ventas pendientes y calcular cambio

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the employee login credentials for the cashier role
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the cash register panel
Review pending sales
Register a valid payment for a pending sale
Verify the calculated change
Verify the paid sale no longer appears in the pending sales list

title: Iniciar sesión como mesero y ver su panel
description: Verifies that an authenticated waiter lands on the correct dashboard after signing in.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the waiter dashboard is displayed

title: Cliente agrega un producto y ve actualizarse el carrito
description: Verifica que un cliente pueda agregar un producto al carrito y ver que el indicador del carrito se actualiza.
category: Selección de mesa y menú para clientes

steps.description: Navigate to /mesa
Select a table
Click the link to open the menu
Add a product to the cart
Verify the cart indicator is updated

title: Seleccionar mesa y abrir el menú
description: Verifies that a client can choose a table and continue to the menu with the selected table recognized.

steps.description: Navigate to /mesa
Select a table
Continue to the menu
Verify the menu is displayed for the selected table

title: Iniciar sesión como cocinero y ver su pantalla
description: Verifies that an authenticated cook lands on the kitchen screen after signing in.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the kitchen screen is displayed

title: Cocinero actualiza el estado de un pedido pendiente
description: Verifica que el cocinero pueda abrir cocina, revisar pedidos pendientes y cambiar el estado de un detalle para que la actualización se refleje en pantalla.
category: Pantalla de cocina con actualización de estados

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the employee login credentials for the kitchen role
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the kitchen screen
Review pending orders
Change the status of an order detail
Verify the updated order detail status is visible in the kitchen screen

title: Cliente confirma una comanda
description: Verifica que un cliente pueda finalizar la selección de productos y confirmar la comanda.
category: Selección de mesa y menú para clientes

steps.description: Navigate to /mesa
Select a table
Click the link to open the menu
Add a product to the cart
Confirm the order
Verify an order confirmation is displayed

title: Iniciar sesión como cajero y ver su panel
description: Verifies that an authenticated cashier lands on the cash register panel after signing in.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the cash register panel is displayed

title: Cliente selecciona una mesa y ve el menú
description: Verifica que un cliente pueda elegir una mesa y llegar al menú agrupado por categorías.
category: Selección de mesa y menú para clientes

steps.description: Navigate to /mesa
View the available tables
Select a table
Verify the menu grouped by categories is displayed

title: Mostrar acceso denegado al abrir un módulo protegido sin sesión
description: Verifies that protected employee modules are not accessible without an authenticated session.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Verify access is restricted
Verify the login screen is shown

title: Cliente selecciona mesa y confirma una comanda
description: Verifica que un cliente pueda elegir una mesa, agregar productos al carrito y confirmar la comanda desde el flujo de mesa y menú.
category: Gestión administrativa de usuarios, mesas y menú

steps.description: Navigate to /mesa
Select a table
Click the link to browse the menu
View products by category
Add a product to the cart
Confirm the order
Verify the order confirmation is visible and the selected table is associated with the order

title: Actualizar el estado de un detalle en cocina
description: Verifies that a cook can change an item status and see the updated preparation state immediately.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /cocina
Open an order detail
Change the item status
Verify the updated preparation state is shown

title: Cocinero ve refresco automático de pedidos
description: Verifica que la pantalla de cocina actualice los pedidos visibles automáticamente después de un cambio de estado.
category: Pantalla de cocina con actualización de estados

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the employee login credentials for the kitchen role
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the kitchen screen
Review pending orders
Change the status of an order detail
Wait for the automatic refresh to complete
Verify the refreshed kitchen view shows the updated order state

title: Administrador ve métricas y estado de la base de datos
description: Verifica que un usuario administrador pueda abrir el panel administrativo y consultar métricas y el estado de la base de datos.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Verify system metrics are displayed
Verify the database status is displayed

title: Administrador revisa y corrige cantidades de inventario
description: Verifica que el administrador pueda revisar ingredientes, filtrar por stock bajo, agregar un ingrediente nuevo y actualizar cantidades desde inventario.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the employee login credentials for the administrator role
Submit the login form
Click the link to manage inventory
View all ingredients
Filter ingredients below minimum stock
Add a new ingredient with valid details
Update the quantity of the newly created ingredient
Verify the ingredient list is displayed and the updated quantity is reflected for the new ingredient

title: Cerrar un pedido atendido desde el panel de mesero
description: Verifies that a waiter can open an active order and close it from the order details view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /mesero
Open an active order
Close the order
Verify the order is removed from the active orders list

title: Administrador gestiona usuarios de principio a fin
description: Verifica que el administrador pueda ver, crear, editar y eliminar usuarios desde su módulo y que los cambios se reflejen en la interfaz.
category: Gestión administrativa de usuarios, mesas y menú

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the employee login credentials for the administrator role
Submit the login form
Click the link to manage users
Create a new user with valid details
Update the newly created user with changed details
Remove the newly created user
Verify the user list is displayed and the created user no longer appears

title: Gestionar usuarios desde el panel administrativo
description: Verifies that an administrator can open user management and see the users module available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin

Navigate to /admin

Fill in the employee login credentials for the administrator role
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the administration dashboard
Click the link to manage users
Click the link to manage tables
Click the link to manage the menu
Click the link to manage inventory

Select a table
Click the link to browse the menu
View products by category
Select another category

description: Verifies that an administrator can open the sales reports module and access report filters.

Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Open the sales reports module

description: Verifica que un visitante sin sesión no pueda abrir el panel administrativo protegido.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin

description: Verifica que el administrador pueda aplicar un rango de fechas y generar un reporte de ventas en PDF desde el módulo de reportes.

Fill in the employee login credentials for the administrator role
Submit the login form
Click the link to view sales reports
Filter sales by a valid date range
Generate the sales report as PDF

title: Login rechaza credenciales inválidas
description: Verifica que el formulario de inicio de sesión muestre un error cuando se ingresan credenciales inválidas y no permita entrar al sistema.
category: Login multi-rol y acceso a dashboards

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in invalid employee credentials
Submit the login form
Verify a login error is visible and the user remains on the authentication screen

title: Empleado ve un error al usar credenciales inválidas
description: Verifica que el sistema rechace un inicio de sesión con credenciales inválidas y muestre un mensaje de error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with invalid-user
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error message is displayed

title: Mostrar validación al ingresar un pago insuficiente
description: Verifies that the cash register panel blocks payment submission when the entered amount is lower than the total.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /caja
Select a pending sale
Enter a payment amount lower than the total
Submit the payment
Verify a payment validation error is shown

title: Cajero ve los datos de venta sin texto técnico visible

category: Panel de caja para cobrar ventas pendientes y calcular cambio

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the employee login credentials for the cashier role
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the cash register panel
Verify the cash register interface is displayed without technical code being visible
